name: Tortured Tomatoes with Bird Dropping Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the tomatoes in cold water and have an adult help cut them into half-inch slices.
2. Place the tomato slices in a Ziploc bag, squeeze out any excess air, and seal tightly.
3. Lay the bag on a clean plate placed in the sink.
4. Gently pound the tomato slices until they appear tortured.
5. Divide the tomatoes among four salad bowls and sprinkle with half a tablespoon of crumbled cheese.
6. Holding a spoon at least 12 inches (30 cm) from the salad bowl, dribble a glob of dressing onto each tomato slice.
